rationale: Educ. Code §7.026 governs agency acceptance of donations for CPR and AED instruction. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: The agency may accept donations, including donations of equipment, for use in providing instruction in cardiopulmonary resuscitation (CPR) and the use of an automated external defibrillator (AED) to students.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this education donation statute.
